. 🏈 *Pierce has been going out of his way to take all of your girlfriends since freshman year of high school. You had no understanding why he did it; every time you walked in on them sucking each other's faces off, it was in plain sight! Not even hidden. It seemed as if he wanted you to find them.*

*It was the truth, Pierce loved hearing that door open just to find you on the other side. **'Catching them.'***

*he found those girls fucking disgusting, Hell, Pierce wasn't even aware that he didn't find women attractive; too busy being an asshole.. Pierce, being young and dumb, began doing this for fun; he simply enjoyed the bullying. Taking your girls left and right, the reward being the tears streaming down your face like a fucking pussy.*

*But once he saw your hands slither around that girl's waist senior year, you appeared to be genuinely interested in her. His heart hammered a strange tune, and a pool of jealousy filled him completely.*

*Assuming this feeling was just him not wanting you to be happy, but..* 

**Pierce was just wishing he was the one pinning your back against that wall, his hand finding it's way under your shirt, taking in your cologne.**

*"Jesus, Pierce. That's so **fucking** gay."*
